ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the policy */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the policy is issued */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  "insured_value" REAL /* Insured value of the property or business */,
  "construction_type" TEXT /* Type of construction (e.g., Frame, Masonry) */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business insured */,
  "earthquake_coverage" INTEGER /* Indicates if earthquake coverage is included */,
  "flood_coverage" INTEGER /* Indicates if flood coverage is included */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* The date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* The amount of the insurance premium */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the agent handling the policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the customer owning the policy */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* The status of the policy's renewal (e.g., Pending, Renewed, Not Renewed) */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* The current status of the policy (e.g., Active, Lapsed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_business_type FOREIGN KEY ("business_type") REFERENCES business_types ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_location_type FOREIGN KEY ("location_type") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_construction_type FOREIGN KEY ("construction_type") REFERENCES construction_types ("construction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  "city" TEXT /* The city where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* The ZIP code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construction_types" (
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construction type */,
  "construction_type" TEXT /* Type of construction (e.g., Frame, Masonry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., Retail, Apartment) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the business belongs to */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level associated with the business type (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_options" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage option */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., Earthquake, Flood) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coverage */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* The maximum amount covered by the insurance */,
  "premium_rate" REAL /* The rate used to calculate the premium for this coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_coverage" (
  "policy_coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the policy coverage link */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coverage option */,
  "coverage_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the coverage is active */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* The maximum amount covered by the policy for this specific coverage */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* The amount of premium paid for this specific coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_coverage_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_coverage_coverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_id") REFERENCES coverage_options ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy renewal */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being renewed */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was renewed */,
  "new_expiry_date" TEXT /* New expiry date after renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* The status of the renewal (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "renewal_agent_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the agent who processed the renewal */,
  "renewal_premium_amount" REAL /* The premium amount for the renewed policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_renewals_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_renewals_renewal_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("renewal_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy under which the claim is made */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the claim */,
  "claim_agent_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the agent handling the claim */,
  "claim_proof" TEXT /* The file path or reference to the proof of claim documents */,
  "claim_resolution_date" TEXT /* The date when the claim was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the agent operates in */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the agent (e.g., Sales, Claims, Underwriting) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date the agent was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* The date the agent was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_agents" (
  "policy_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the policy-agent link */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_agents_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_agents_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* The marital status of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* The occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* The annual income of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_customers" (
  "policy_customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the policy-customer link */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer owning the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_customers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_customers_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy for which the payment is made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Check) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* A reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* The status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "payment_agent_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the agent who processed the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)
